title: Democracy - Wikipedia
content: Democracy[nb 1] is a form of government in which political power is vested in the people or the population of a state. [2][3][4] Under a minimalist definition ofdemocracy, rulers are elected through competitive elections while more expansive or maximalist definitions linkdemocracyto guarantees of civil liberties and human rights in addition to competitive elections.
